title: Gairvis
description: A branded web and canvas product combining a public site with interactive AI work surfaces.
body:
Gairvis combines branded web work with an interactive canvas product surface.

The Rocket repos include a public web presence and canvas-oriented product work. The public version of the story is about shaping an AI-facing interface that feels useful, readable, and tied to a real brand instead of a generic demo.

## What it explores

- A Next.js web surface with SEO and brand foundations.
- Canvas-style interaction patterns for AI-assisted work.
- Product structure that can support more than a static marketing page.
- Clearer code organization as the product grows.

## Current direction

Recent work focused on web structure, brand-ready components, and reliability improvements in the canvas-side product.
